description: prisma.$executeRawUnsafe(`DELETE FROM t WHERE x = ${v}`) — Prisma's unsafe-mutation raw-entrypoint with template-interpolation. Mutation-class sibling of $queryRawUnsafe; attacker-controlled interpolation can alter or destroy rows. Post-v0.15.3 sink-list expansion, template-sql-checker MUST emit CRITICAL/CWE-89.
